title: Johnson Controls International plc FY2025 Form 10-K
note: Primary source for business description, portfolio, OpenBlue strategy, competition, revenue mix, net sales, earnings, cash flow, and segment context.

title: OpenBlue
note: Official product page describing OpenBlue as a cyber-secured AI-powered smart-building ecosystem for energy, equipment, workplace, and operations use cases.

title: Metasys System Configuration Guide
note: Official technical documentation explaining Metasys architecture, network engines, servers, controllers, site directors, and BACnet-tested device integration.

title: Johnson Controls International (JCI) Market Cap & Net Worth
note: Market-data source for point-in-time market capitalization and share price used in refreshed valuation metrics.

title: 100% Open Source IoT Device Management Platform
note: Open-source IoT platform source for device management, rules, dashboards, MQTT, HTTP, WebSocket APIs, protocol agents, and professional IoT use cases.

title: openremote/openremote
note: Repository source confirming OpenRemote source availability and open-source platform positioning.

title: Eclipse VOLTTRON
note: Open-source building and energy automation project source for agent architecture, edge or cloud deployment, BACnet and Modbus drivers, publish-subscribe bus, and Apache 2.0 licensing.

title: BACnet Stack
note: Open-source BACnet protocol stack source used as an enabling component for interoperable controllers, gateways, and supervisory edge devices.
